docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $967.46 FILED BY BORODULIN, NATALYA BORODULIN, GERMAN G. BORODULIN, IRINE AS TO DEFENDANT BUSVAN STORAGE&UNCLAIMEDHOUSEHOLDGOODSSALES CO INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 07
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERT. RECEIPT TO MICHAEL C. BASK RETURNED SIGNED.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BORODULIN, NATALYA BORODULIN, GERMAN G. BORODULIN, IRINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BUSVAN STORAGE&UNCLAIMEDHOUSEHOLDGOODSSALES CO INC $967.46 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $987.46, PLTF MUST MAKE THE SOFABED AVAILABLE TO BUSVAN FOR PICK UP AT BUSVAN'S EXPENSE. PAYMENT IS TO BE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BUSVAN STORAGE&UNCLAIMEDHOUSEHOLDGOODSSALES CO INC
